http.server/BaseHTTPRequestHandler/error.name: error_content_type
http.server/BaseHTTPRequestHandler/error.description: Specifies the Content-Type HTTP header of error responses sent to the client. The default value is 'text/html'.

info.excerpt: Specifies the Content-Type HTTP header of error responses sent to the client. The default value is 'text/html'.

http.server/BaseHTTPRequestHandler/error.name: error_message_format
http.server/BaseHTTPRequestHandler/error.description: Specifies a format string that should be used by send_error() method for building an error response to the client. The string is filled by default with variables from responses based on the status code that passed to send_error().

info.excerpt: Specifies a format string that should be used by send_error() method for building an error response to the client. The string is filled by default with variables from responses based on the status cod...

http.server/SimpleHTTPRequestHandler/ext.name: extensions_map
http.server/SimpleHTTPRequestHandler/ext.description: A dictionary mapping suffixes into MIME types, contains custom overrides for the default system mappings. The mapping is used case-insensitively, and so should contain only lower-cased keys. Changed in version 3.9: This dictionary is no longer filled with the default system mappings, but only contains overrides.

info.excerpt: A dictionary mapping suffixes into MIME types, contains custom overrides for the default system mappings. The mapping is used case-insensitively, and so should contain only lower-cased keys. Changed i...

http.server/BaseHTTPRequestHandler/end_h.name: end_headers
http.server/BaseHTTPRequestHandler/end_h.description: Adds a blank line (indicating the end of the HTTP headers in the response) to the headers buffer and calls flush_headers(). Changed in version 3.2: The buffered headers are written to the output stream.
